decoder_heading: This privacy policy relates to our mobile applications ("apps")
ident_heading: This privacy policy relates to our mobile applications ("apps")
heading_content_part: This privacy policy relates to our mobile applications ("apps").

No Collection of Personal InformationWe do not collect any personnaly identifiable information about you when you are using our applications. 							Under no circumstances do we collect, download or otherwise make copies of any images you make using our 							photography applications.

decoder_heading: Collection of Information for Statistical Purposes
ident_heading: Collection of Information for Statistical Purposes
heading_content_part: Collection of Information for Statistical PurposesOur apps may automatically collect anonymous information regarding app usage using third-party SDKs (for example Google Analytics or Google Firebase Analytics)							to help us understand how our users use the Application. None of this information identifies you personally.Our apps may give you the option to opt out of this statistical information gathering process, via its settings.
